title: Kubernetes vs. OpenShift: Choosing DevOps and CI/CD Workflows
summary: A video from IBM Technology comparing Kubernetes and OpenShift as container platforms for DevOps and CI/CD workflows. It examines how platform choices affect deployment pipelines, operations, and delivery speed.
writeup: This IBM Technology video compares Kubernetes and OpenShift specifically for DevOps and CI/CD workflows. It examines how the choice between the two platforms shapes deployment pipelines, day-to-day operations, and delivery speed in container environments. The takeaway is that platform selection is not neutral: it directly affects how pipelines are built and run and how quickly software ships.
